```bash
   ./start.sh \
    -s "https://sv.sv-1.dev.global.canton.network.sync.global" \
    -o "$ONBOARDING_SECRET" \
    -p "$PARTY_HINT" \
    -m $MIGRATION_ID \
    -w \
    -a

```
